Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: Re-enable Edit tool for channel leads [Midtown !2081] (#1810)

* feat: re-enable Edit tool for channel leads

Channel leads need the Edit tool to maintain their notes, plans, and
workflow files stored in ~/.midtown/projects/*/channels/*/. Remove Edit
from the disallowed tools list while keeping Write and NotebookEdit
blocked. Update the channel-lead prompt to allow Edit for notes/workflow
files only, not for modifying source code.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: Keep Edit hard-blocked for channel lead fork sessions

Fork sessions have narrower context (scoped to a single thread) and are
historically more prone to ignoring prompt-based restrictions (PR #1667).
Re-add Edit to the hard-block list for forks via a new
`channel_lead_fork_disallowed_tools()` function, while keeping it
available for top-level channel lead sessions that need it for notes.

Addresses review feedback from york on PR #1810.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

commit.message:
Fix video muting when floating to corner on attraction pages

Replace document.body.appendChild() with overflow:visible on the wrap
element. Moving the iframe's DOM parent caused browsers to reload the
iframe, resetting audio state. Now the container stays in place and
uses position:fixed + overflow:visible to escape clipping - matching
the SponsorSections.tsx approach. Playback and audio are uninterrupted.

feat: obituary property resolution pipeline with deceased owner search

- Add enrichByDeceasedSearch() — searches PropertyRadar for deceased
  properties in same county, fuzzy-matches owner name (min 70% confidence)
- Add extractNextOfKin() — parses obituary "survived by" text for
  spouse, children, sibling names and relationships
- Add nameMatchScore() — fuzzy name scoring (exact=1.0, full=0.95,
  partial first=0.85, same initial=0.70, last-only=0.50)
- Route CRAWL-* records through deceased search instead of address lookup
- Store obit_match_confidence, obit_next_of_kin, obit_mail_address in
  owner_flags after successful match
- Strengthen quality gate: require real street address (starts with digit)
  — blocks "Spokane, WA" and "County — pending enrichment" placeholders
- Add obituary confidence gate in promoteByTier() — unresolved obituary
  records stay in staging until matched with >= 70% confidence
- MCF modal: show Obituary Record section with match confidence %,
  heir mailing address, and next-of-kin names + relationships

fix(template-doc): tenta ZIP primeiro, usa mammoth só se falhar

Reverte a lógica de detectar extensão .doc para usar mammoth.
Agora tenta abrir o arquivo como ZIP independente da extensão:
- .docx e .doc modernos (OOXML): abre como ZIP normalmente ✓
- .doc binário OLE antigo: ZIP falha → fallback para mammoth

Corrige regressão onde Modelo de prova.doc (OOXML renomeado) parou de funcionar.

commit.message:
fix: critical crash + data loss + wrong price bugs in Live Prices

Bug 1 — CRASH + DATA LOSS (blank screen after Live Prices click):
  App.jsx updateData() called setInvestments(prev => prev.map(...))
  which passed the FUNCTION to saveData(). JSON.stringify(fn) returns
  undefined → localStorage stored "undefined" → on next load investments
  cleared to []. State was also set to the function itself → React crashed
  with TypeError when calling .filter() on a function.
  Fix: updateData() now supports functional updaters — if newValueOrFn is
  a function, compute newValue from current state before saving.

Bug 2 — WRONG PRICE (BHP showing $75.60 USD instead of $52 AUD):
  For an AUD portfolio, Finnhub tried BHP.AX (fails on free tier) then
  fell back to BHP (NYSE, USD = $75.60) — shown incorrectly as AUD.
  Fix: fetchFinnhubPrice() now accepts currency param. For AUD portfolios,
  plain symbols (no .AX suffix) ONLY try SYMBOL.AX — no US exchange fallback.
  This prevents fetching NYSE/non-ASX prices that aren't in AUD.

Bug 3 — UX CLARITY (symbol format not clear enough):
  Users entered "BHP" expecting ASX price but got NYSE price.
  Fix: Form placeholder updated to "BHP.AX · ANZ.AX · AAPL · BTC".
  Inline hint shown for Stock/ETF type: "ASX stocks: add .AX suffix".
  Auto-fetch error now suggests adding .AX if plain symbol fails.
  Settings Live Prices section explains the .AX requirement.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix layout spacing and redesign logo

Remove unlayered CSS reset (* { margin: 0; padding: 0 }) that was
overriding all Tailwind v4 utility classes (padding, margin, gap),
causing everything to appear crunched together. Also fix broken
@font-face pointing to a CSS URL instead of a font file.

Replace PNG logo with inline SVG Logo component for cleaner rendering
and a more modern, premium look.

mRNA: HP35 coding sequence + backbone straightening restraints

Replace poly-U with repeating HP35 codons (340 nt). Base atoms
reconstructed via PDBFixer from tiled backbone. Added P-P-P angle
restraints (k=50, theta0=pi) to reduce backbone kinkiness during
relaxation. Local 500K-step relaxation in progress.
